claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Mendable is the easiest way to decrease user activation time. Our AI is trained on your data and can instantly answer any question your customers have when onboarding or just using your product.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a link labeled 'Pricing' that can be clicked to access the pricing page.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: Documentation is accessible without login at docs.mendable.ai.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Mendable supports SAML 2.0, OpenID Connect, and OAuth 2.0 for single sign-on (SSO) and identity federation.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Mendable is SOC 2 Type II certified. Check out our AI Trust Center for additional information.
